title: <div><tt>I’m looking for an attorney in Broward County familiar with probate dis
content:
I’m looking for an attorney in Broward County familiar with probate disputes, especially involving unmarried partners. Open to contingency or flexible fees.
Please contact me at [your phone/email] if you're available for a consult.
Thank you, [Your Name]

II. Tell Your Story – 3 Lengths

1. Snapshot Version
In 2–5 sentences, describe what happened and what outcome you want:

2. Guided Version (Write in 4 Steps)
Before: What was your relationship and legal/financial setup?
Shift: What changed around the time of death?
Incident: What happened with the estate, funeral, or money?
After: What are you dealing with now, and what do you want help fixing?

3. Full Version (Diary + Case File Style)
Write the full story from beginning to now. Include facts, emotions, red flags, conversations, power shifts — anything that feels off. Start from when things were normal, and walk through everything that changed.
context: From document: Lawyer Script & Story Comping — chunk 2 (chunk 2/3)
